title: Fix timeout issue
body:
We are seeing some wierd timeouts in testing, if we eliminate
the bridged networkin in the container runtime, we hope to be
able to eliminate this problem.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: Hopefully this fixes the testing issue we are seeing with https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/pull/280

:pushpin: Commit 73da53b has been approved by `nalind`

:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
